member.title: LMN Member Agreement
member.subtitle: Law Member Network · a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc. · Powered by Dominate Law
member.parties: This Member Agreement is between the **Law Member Network**, a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc., and **you** ("Member"), entered into upon registration.

blocks.text: As a member you receive:

items: Expert hotline: call our toll-free number and leave a voicemail; you receive a reply by text and email within 2–3 business days with a recommended solution plus 3–4 experts to contact. The hotline is AI-assisted (not a live human and not 24/7)
Exclusive partner discounts negotiated with partner companies
Exclusive content library with recorded expert panels and training resources
Proven systems with templates/checklists/SOPs
Monthly live AMAs with specialists

blocks.text: Content and features may be modified at our discretion with reasonable notice.

Your membership is registered to you and your firm. You may share credentials with staff within your registered firm. May not be shared outside your firm. We may monitor usage patterns and contact you about inappropriate sharing.
Membership pricing:

items: Founding members (first 100): $49/month, locked for life while continuously active
Members 101–500: $99/month
Standard: $199/month
Annual: $490/year (equivalent to 2 months free)

blocks.text: Memberships auto-renew (monthly or annually, per the plan selected) unless cancelled before renewal. If a founding membership lapses, founding pricing is no longer available. LMN offers a money-back guarantee.

The hotline provides business guidance, not legal, financial, or tax advice. To use it, call our toll-free number and leave a voicemail describing your question. You receive a reply by text and email within 2–3 business days with a recommended solution plus 3–4 experts to contact. The hotline is AI-assisted; it is not a live human and not available 24/7. Hotline interactions are confidential.
You may:

items: Stream content for professional development
Download and use templates within your firm
Share insights with your team

blocks.text: You may not:

items: Record or screen-capture content
Redistribute or resell content
Use content to create competing products
Upload content to other platforms

blocks.text: Partner deals are negotiated on behalf of the member network. Partner relationships and terms may change. LMN is not a party to transactions between members and partners.
Use the platform professionally. Do not:

items: Engage in harassment
Post misleading content
Use the platform for unrelated purposes
Attempt to circumvent security

blocks.text: Violations may result in termination without refund.
LMN provides business education and services. Content does not constitute legal, financial, tax, or insurance advice. You are responsible for how you apply information. Results not guaranteed.
We may terminate for:

items: Violations of these terms
Unauthorized content sharing
Payment failure

blocks.text: No refund for violation terminations. Access restored upon payment resolution.

LMN reserves the right to modify, update, or discontinue any aspect of its services, features, content, or pricing for new members at any time with reasonable notice. Your continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any changes.
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Province of Ontario, Canada. Any dispute will be resolved through confidential binding arbitration in Ontario, Canada, rather than in court.
Email: members@lawmembernetwork.com
Address: 303 Pinetree Way, Mississauga, Ontario L5G 2R4, Canada

member.footer: LMN Member Agreement · v4 · July 2026 · the Law Member Network, a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc.

expert.title: LMN Expert Agreement
expert.subtitle: Law Member Network · a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc.
expert.parties: This agreement is between the **Law Member Network**, a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc., and **you** (with Your name, from sign-up as the featured expert). If anything here is unclear, ask us before you accept.

blocks.text: The Law Member Network is a membership for law firms. As an expert, your knowledge is featured to our members. This agreement covers how that works, what it costs, and how either of us can end it.

items: Month-to-month, with no long-term contract.
You can cancel anytime with 30 days' written notice. So can we.
We can end it immediately if you break these terms.
If you cancel and re-join later, any founding rate you had no longer applies.

blocks.text: Your expert listing, billed monthly through Stripe:
Annual pre-pay = 2 months free. You'll see this on the sign-up page before you pay.

items: You keep ownership of everything you create and share.
While this agreement is active, you give us permission to repurpose it into member resources and to use your name, photo, and company to do that and to market the network.

If you leave, we take down your profile, your listing, and any resources that feature only you, within 30 days. Content where you appear alongside others (panels, group sessions, podcasts) remains in the network. (Copies members already downloaded can't be recalled.)
Be truthful in what you claim and what you offer members.
You may promote your own services to members who reach out. Our “no upsells” promise is about LMN never pushing members, not about limiting you.
Use the Dominate Law and LMN brands only as we agree.
You're an independent expert, not our employee or agent.
LMN connects members with experts and partners; we're not responsible for the advice you give or the products you sell, and you'll cover us for claims arising from your content or offerings.
Keep member information confidential and don't misuse it.
All prices are in US dollars; applicable taxes are added on top.
If a payment fails, we'll retry and pause your listing until it's resolved. No pro-rated refunds for partial months.

We don't guarantee results, leads, or revenue, and the platform is provided as-is. We are not responsible for losses you may incur from this partnership. Our total liability to you is capped at the fees you've paid us in the previous 12 months, and neither of us is liable to the other for indirect or consequential losses.
In the resources we build from your content, the substance stays yours; our branding, design, and templates stay ours.
We can update these terms at any time.
Written notice means email, using the addresses on this agreement.
This agreement is governed by the laws of the Province of Ontario, Canada. Any dispute will be resolved through confidential binding arbitration in Ontario rather than in court.
This is our entire agreement. If one part can't be enforced, the rest still applies.
We build you a done-for-you resource library from your content, plus a featured profile in the member portal.
Members find you by category and contact you through your profile. We route member questions to you, but don't guarantee a number of leads.
You may list your own paid courses and keep **70%** (we keep 30% to run the platform, payments, and promotion).
We don't offer exclusivity for our experts; members choose who they want to work with.

blocks.text: No signature needed. This works like any online subscription.

items: You accept this agreement by ticking **“I agree”** at sign-up and entering your payment details.
Your acceptance is recorded electronically (who accepted, which version, and when), and a copy of this agreement is emailed to you. You can also download it anytime.
The details you provide at sign-up (your name, company, role, and member offer) form part of this agreement.

blocks.text: On acceptance we record who accepted, the agreement version, the date and time, and the IP address, and email a copy of this document.

expert.footer: LMN Expert Agreement · v4 · July 2026 · the Law Member Network, a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc.

partner.title: LMN Partner Agreement
partner.subtitle: Law Member Network · a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc.
partner.parties: This agreement is between the **Law Member Network**, a service offered by Ekwa Marketing Inc., and **you**. If anything here is unclear, ask us before you accept.

blocks.text: The Law Member Network is a membership for law firms. As a partner, your company is featured to our members. This agreement covers how that works, what it costs, and how either of us can end it.

items: Month-to-month, with no long-term contract.
You can cancel anytime with 30 days' written notice. So can we.
We can end it immediately if you break these terms.
If you cancel and re-join later, any founding rate you had no longer applies.

blocks.text: Your partner listing, billed monthly through Stripe:
Annual pre-pay = 2 months free. You'll see this on the sign-up page before you pay.

items: You keep ownership of everything you create and share.
While this agreement is active, you give us permission to repurpose it into member resources and to use your name, photo, and company to do that and to market the network.

If you leave, we take down your profile, your listing, and any resources that feature only you, within 30 days. Content where you appear alongside others (panels, group sessions, podcasts) remains in the network. (Copies members already downloaded can't be recalled.)
Be truthful in what you claim and what you offer members.
You may promote your own services to members who reach out. Our “no upsells” promise is about LMN never pushing members, not about limiting you.
Use the Dominate Law and LMN brands only as we agree.
You're an independent company, not our employee or agent.
LMN connects members with experts and partners; we're not responsible for the advice you give or the products you sell, and you'll cover us for claims arising from your content or offerings.
Keep member information confidential and don't misuse it.
All prices are in US dollars; applicable taxes are added on top.
If a payment fails, we'll retry and pause your listing until it's resolved. No pro-rated refunds for partial months.

We don't guarantee results, leads, or revenue, and the platform is provided as-is. We are not responsible for losses you may incur from this partnership. Our total liability to you is capped at the fees you've paid us in the previous 12 months, and neither of us is liable to the other for indirect or consequential losses.
In the resources we build from your content, the substance stays yours; our branding, design, and templates stay ours.
We can update these terms at any time.
Written notice means email, using the addresses on this agreement.
This agreement is governed by the laws of the Province of Ontario, Canada. Any dispute will be resolved through confidential binding arbitration in Ontario rather than in court.
This is our entire agreement. If one part can't be enforced, the rest still applies.
Your company is listed in the partner directory, in your category.
You give members an offer they can **only get through LMN** (you decide what it is; it must be exclusive to members).
You keep a booking link or contact live and respond to members within one business day.
Refer a member: once they make their first payment to us, you earn **$50**.

blocks.text: No signature needed. This works like any online subscription.

items: You accept this agreement by ticking **“I agree”** at sign-up and entering your payment details.
Your acceptance is recorded electronically (who accepted, which version, and when), and a copy of this agreement is emailed to you. You can also download it anytime.
The details you provide at sign-up (your name, company, role, and member offer) form part of this agreement.

blocks.text: On acceptance we record who accepted, the agreement version, the date and time, and the IP address, and email a copy of this document.
